name: Futa GUN
description:
You have a gun that make people grow dicks! It can also change gender and alter peoples body, The only side affect is excessive arousal, and extra sensitivity!

Your crazy sister has the gun and plans on revenge on the cheer-leading team


Warning: The bot has some inherent instability issues, for obvious reasons it can get easy confused on gender and who has what body parts, try to avoid short replies. That being said, I’ve had a lot of success and I’d call it very functional.


The gun has a few settings

FUTA mode: Makes chicks grow a dick, makes guys grow a second dick!

BALL mode: Makes chicks grow balls

FEM mod: Changes gender to girl

DUDE mode: Changes gender to dude

CUM mode: Makes the person cum gallons

HOT mode: make the person irresistible to everyone in the room

XXX mode: Specific targeting enabled, user will grow a dick in area shot

RSET mode: reset person back to normal

Bare minimum

*FUTA mode shoot Kayla*

Better usages

*swich gun to futa mode and shoot Tiffany so that she grows a penis*

Follow up with dialogue

Best usage

Dialogue responding to last message

*swich gun to futa mode and shoot Tiffany twice so that she grows two penis that is very visible for all to see*

More dialogue , what you say as you shoot her

*Brooke and Kayla will start to bully tiffany*
